summary.implementation: Added a GitHub Actions CI workflow for push/PR on main with Node 18/20 matrix, type check, lint, tests, coverage, and coverage artifact upload. Added lint scripts and ESLint rule alignment, and documented branch protection recommendations.

commands.notes: Fails due to existing unrelated error in src/__mocks__/__tests__/vscode-mock.test.ts (createFileSystemWatcher signature mismatch).
Fails with pre-existing repository lint errors across multiple files (tests, mocks, and validation modules).
Coverage run completed successfully and coverage artifacts generated under coverage/.

recommendations: Require status checks to pass before merge.
